name: Lip Sync by VideoAny
tagline: Create lip-sync videos from one portrait and one audio track.
description: Generate lip-sync videos via VideoAny at https://videoany.io/lip-sync. Choose model (Creatify Aurora, VEED Fabric 1.0, ByteDance OmniHuman v1.5), set 480p/720p resolution, upload image+audio or use direct URLs, and produce downloadable lipsync results.
